title: Atlantis The Royal’s AEON Center debuts clinical home-delivery wellness across Dubai | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
summary: The at-home model integrates medical-grade care into everyday living, allowing patients to receive treatment in a private environment while still benefiting from hospital-level standards.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE—AEON Centre for Regenerative Wellness, based at Atlantis The Royal, has expanded its clinical services beyond its flagship facility by introducing personalized intravenous (IV) therapy at home across Dubai.

The new service brings regenerative wellness treatments directly to patients in major residential communities and luxury hotel settings, offering convenience without compromising clinical oversight.

The at-home model integrates medical-grade care into everyday living, allowing patients to receive treatment in a private environment while still benefiting from hospital-level standards.

According to the centre, the approach reflects its broader philosophy of combining comfort with precision medicine.

Personalized assessment and bespoke formulations

Each at-home IV therapy session begins with a detailed medical evaluation conducted by AEON’s clinical team.

Based on this assessment, clinicians design individualized nutrient formulations tailored to the patient’s health profile, lifestyle needs, and wellness goals.

The centre emphasizes that no two infusions are identical. Instead, formulations are adjusted to address specific concerns such as energy levels, immunity, recovery needs, and metabolic balance.

This tailored approach aims to ensure both safety and measurable physiological outcomes.

All treatments are delivered by Dubai Health Authority (DHA)-licensed clinicians who follow the same international medical protocols applied within AEON’s Atlantis The Royal facility.

This continuity of standards ensures that patients receive consistent care whether inside the clinic or at home.

Service categories: Vitamin IV and NAD+ therapy

AEON’s mobile service currently offers two primary intravenous therapy options.

 The first is Vitamin IV at Home, designed for individuals experiencing fatigue, dehydration, immune stress, post-travel exhaustion, or nutritional gaps.

This infusion delivers a combination of vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, and fluids directly into the bloodstream, bypassing the digestive system to enhance absorption and immediate availability.

The second option is NAD+ IV Therapy, which targets patients focused on longevity, cognitive performance, and cellular recovery.

Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide (NAD+) plays a central role in energy production and mitochondrial function within cells.

As natural NAD+ levels decline with age, the therapy aims to support cellular repair and metabolic efficiency through direct intravenous delivery under clinical supervision.

Clinical supervision and regenerative focus

Dr. Jaffer Khan, Founder and CEO of AEON, noted that extending IV therapy into home settings reflects the centre’s evolving care model.

He explained that while the environment of care may change, the clinical standards remain consistent across all service delivery points.

Both Vitamin IV and NAD+ infusions are administered under strict medical oversight, with dosage and treatment duration determined following individual assessments.

The service continues to position AEON within Dubai’s growing regenerative wellness sector, where personalized, science-driven therapies are increasingly integrated into lifestyle healthcare models.
